title: Kantian Respect and the Transplant Case
description: Use the transplant case to test the requirement to treat persons as ends.

steps.text: A surgeon can save five patients by killing one healthy patient for organs.

steps.prompt: Is the surgeon permitted to proceed?

steps.text: Apply the requirement to treat persons as ends, not merely as means.
Kantian ethics emphasizes universalizable maxims and respect for persons.

steps.notes: Does your judgment align with the Kantian requirement?

steps.text: Contrast the Kantian constraint with outcome maximization.

steps.prompt: Would you revise your judgment or your principle to improve coherence?
